data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 5,404 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 222 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 5,404 BTC today, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 4,931 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 643,755 BTC, worth US$71.48 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 222 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 9,989 ETH. BlackRock currently holds 1,318,043 ETH, worth US$3.51 billion.

data.title: Kraken to Launch 24/7 Tokenized Equities Trading for International Users
data.description:
TL;DR Kraken will allow non-U. S. users to trade Apple, Tesla, Nvidia and other popular company shares in the form of digital tokens, available 24/7. These instruments, known as “xStocks,” will be backed by real securities and run on the Solana blockchain. The initiative aims to reduce costs and barriers for international investors seeking access to. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/kraken-to-launch-24-7-tokenized-equities-trading-for-international-users/

data.title: JPMorgan Chase to provide OpenAI with more than $7 billion in loans for data centers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: People familiar with the matter revealed that JPMorgan Chase has agreed to provide more than $7 billion in loans to companies building OpenAI's giant artificial intelligence data center park in Abilene, Texas. The transaction with JPMorgan Chase shows the continued interest of financial institutions and investors in supporting the physical infrastructure needed to develop advanced artificial intelligence software. The bank has previously provided $2.3 billion in loans to companies developing the Abilene data center for the first phase of the project. The latest $7 billion loan will supplement the funds needed for the construction of the data center. Once completed, the data center will become one of the largest centers in the world, with a total of eight buildings, each costing $1.4 billion. The data center can accommodate a total of 400,000 Nvidia chips. (The Information)

data.title: Sui: The Cetus team is exploring ways to recover funds and return them to the community
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sui released an update on the X platform saying: "Cetus works with other DeFi protocols, Sui Foundation, and Sui validators to protect the ecosystem. A large number of validators have identified the addresses where Cetu funds were stolen and will ignore transactions on these addresses until further notice. The Cetus team is exploring ways to recover these funds and return them to the community, and an incident report will be released soon. The Sui Foundation and other members of the ecosystem will be committed to supporting Cetus to resolve this incident."

data.title: JPMorgan Extends $7 Billion Loan for Texas AI Data Center
data.description: According to Odaily, JPMorgan Chase has agreed to provide over $7 billion in loans to companies building a massive AI data center complex in Abilene, Texas, for OpenAI. This deal highlights the ongoing interest of financial institutions and investors in supporting the infrastructure necessary for developing advanced AI software. Previously, JPMorgan had extended $2.3 billion in loans for the initial phase of the Abilene data center project. The latest $7 billion loan will complete the funding required for the construction of the data center. Once completed, the facility will be one of the largest in the world, consisting of eight buildings, each costing $1.4 billion. The data center will have the capacity to house 400,000 Nvidia chips.

data.title: Sui Freezes $160 Million in Assets Amid Cross-Chain Escape Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, SlowMist's Cosine reported on the X platform that Sui's official intervention led to the freezing of $160 million in assets before they could escape cross-chain. Additionally, over $60 million remains distributed across two addresses, with nearly all of it converted into 23,243 ETH.

data.title: BSC Foundation spent $25,000 each to buy MYX/BANK/LISTA/GM in the past 5 minutes
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the BSC Foundation spent $25,000 each to buy MYX/BANK/LISTA/GM in the past 5 minutes, of which GM's circulating market value is $8.4 million and MYX's circulating market value is $6.38 million, which are the first and second smallest tokens in terms of market value among the tokens currently purchased by the foundation.

data.title: Upbit temporarily suspends Sui Network digital asset deposits and withdrawals
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, due to a security incident in DEX Cetus within the Sui network, Upbit temporarily suspended the deposit and withdrawal services of Sui Network digital assets. The digital assets involved include: SUI, LWA, DEEP, WAL. The deposit and withdrawal support will be resumed after the incident is confirmed to be stable.

data.title: Brazilian financial institution Braza Group launches USDB stablecoin on XRPL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Brazilian financial institution Braza Group launched the US dollar stablecoin USDB on XRPL. The stablecoin is backed by US and Brazilian bonds and aims to achieve fast and stable global transfers. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: Almost all the unfrozen funds of Cetus hackers have been exchanged for ETH, a total of 23,243
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: SlowMist Yuxian posted on the X platform that Sui officials intervened to freeze the $160 million in assets that had not yet escaped across the chain. The remaining more than $60 million was distributed in two addresses, almost all of which were converted into ETH, a total of 23,243 pieces.

data.title: Semiconductor exemptions don’t matter when it comes to tariffs
data.description:
Opinion by: Ahmad Shadid of O. xyzSemiconductors scored a rare exemption from US President Donald Trump’s aggressive reciprocal tariffs, but the relief is symbolic at best. Most semiconductors enter the US embedded in servers, GPUs, laptops, and smartphones.  The finished goods remain heavily tariffed, some with duties reaching up to 49%
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/semiconductor-exemptions-don-t-matter?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Cetus: Attackers stole approximately $223 million, of which $162 million has been successfully frozen
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cetus posted on the X platform that it has confirmed that an attacker has stolen approximately $223 million from the Cetus protocol. It has taken immediate action to lock the contract to prevent further theft of funds, and $162 million of stolen funds have been successfully suspended. It is currently working with the Sui Foundation and other ecosystem members to develop the next solution, with the goal of recovering the remaining stolen funds.
Most of the affected funds have been suspended, and we are actively seeking ways to recover the remaining funds. There is no higher priority and will be updated in a timely manner through this channel. The full incident report will be published later.

data.title: Greeks.Live: Despite the market's potential 15-20% correction, the community remains generally bullish
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.Live released a community briefing, which pointed out that: Although some people warned that Bitcoin is about to see a 15-20% correction, the group is generally bullish and expects the upward momentum to continue. Key levels of attention include the immediate support level of $110,000, the near-term target level of $120,000, and the long-term target level of $150,000-200,000. Negative funding rates indicate that despite the market rebound, many people are still shorting. Many traders are buying protective put options while remaining bullish overall, expecting that prices may fall back to the $100-103,000 range before continuing to rise.

data.title: SUI Lianchuang: The $160 million stolen from Cetus has been frozen and will be returned to the pool soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News SUI Lianchuang Adeniyi.sui said that of the $220 million stolen from Cetus, $160 million has been frozen and will be returned to the Cetus pool soon. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Linea Product Manager: LINEA Token Economics Enters Final Legal Review Stage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Linea Product Manager Declan Fox posted on the X platform, "Linea's decentralization is progressing smoothly, and the token economy and governance proposals have entered the final legal review. In terms of products, Beta v2 will be launched on the mainnet next month, bringing important performance upgrades. There are also plans for Limitless Prover and Pectra hard forks in the future. Ecosystem construction is accelerating, and the newly launched Linea Hub facilitates developer access and supports large-scale project integration. Token-related information will only be released through official channels, so please be wary of scams."
